hints.text: US state; most common plate = white w/ an **arcing rainbow** across the centre (visible even through blur); front plates required
Only US state w/ its **own language** — Hawaiian place names on signs; vowel-heavy, just 8 consonants (H K L M N P W + ʻokina), macrons Ā Ē Ī Ō Ū
Lots of Gen4 **smallcam**; Gen3 often has a stubby **antenna**; fair amount of **Gen2** (rural) — all rare/notable for the US
Lush tropical vegetation (ferns, tall grass) on **volcanic topography** — sloping volcanoes, cliffs, valleys, craters
Homes = 1–2 storey **wood**, light colours, often w/ **volcanic-rock retaining walls**; thick **yellow bands** on poles (not California's 3 stripes)
Highway shields shaped like a **guitar pick** (number at the bottom) on yellow posts
State-highway first digit = island (1–2 Hawaiʻi, 3 Maui, 5 Kauaʻi, 6–9 Oʻahu); **Kauaʻi** = deep red soil + jungle; **Oʻahu** = Honolulu, the largest city
